findings.evidence_context: research.json narrative.quickstart example for `emails to <recipient>`. RFC 2606 reserved @example.com placeholder; first occurrence in each of SKILL/README/research.json was replaced with angle-bracket placeholder, this is the second occurrence in the file.
research.json narrative.recipes example for `contacts where <email>`. RFC 2606 reserved @example.com placeholder; remaining occurrence after first was replaced with <contact-email>.
research.json narrative.recipes 'Reconstruct what a user has received' example. RFC 2606 reserved @example.com placeholder; remaining occurrence after first replacement to <your-email>.

SKILL.md Recipes section, 'Reconstruct what a user has received' worked example. RFC 2606 reserved @example.com used as documentation placeholder; angle-bracket placeholders applied to all other SKILL/README/research.json occurrences in this same pass to reduce baseline PII count.
